explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: Paroxysmal extreme pain disorder Description: Paroxysmal extreme pain disorder is a rare disorder of abnormal pain sensation. Phenotypes: Autosomal dominant inheritance; Lacrimation abnormality; Seizure; Tachycardia; Bradycardia; Constipation; Neonatal onset; Impaired pain sensation; Flushi
